title: June 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 5''' is the 156th day of the year (157th in leap years), with 209 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Kathleen Kennedy]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Mary Kay Bergman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Jeff Garlin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Ricardo Mamood Vega]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 119|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 119]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 12]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 23]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Invasion 0, Part 2]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2013]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 5|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 5]] published
*[[2017]] – [[Andy Cunningham]] dies.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 4]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Age of Rebellion - Luke Skywalker 1|''Age of Rebellion - Luke Skywalker'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 22|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 22]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Process]]" premieres on [[Disney+]].
*[[2022]] – [[Fortnite Chapter 3: Season 3]] began.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 47|''Star Wars'' (2020) 47]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic (2023) 8|''The High Republic'' (2023) 8]] published.
